sentences.translation: Stari sat radio je na vodu.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient clock worked with water.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَاءُ يَسْقُطُ ببُطْءٍ مِنْ وِعَاءٍ إِلَى آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Voda je polako padala iz jedne posude u drugu.
sentences.translationEn: The water fell slowly from one vessel to another.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تُعَيِّنُ الْوَقْتَ لِلنَّاسِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pokazivalo je vrijeme ljudima u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: It used to tell the time for the people in the city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْعُلَمَاءُ يُفَكِّرُونَ كَثِيرًا لِاخْتِرَاعِ هَذِهِ الأَدَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci su puno razmišljali da izmisle ovaj alat.
sentences.translationEn: The scholars thought a lot to invent this tool.
